title: Aranet Wireless Sensor RSSI Degradation and Mesh Margin
dataSources: `index=environment` `sourcetype=aranet:sensor` JSON from Aranet Cloud API, Aranet PRO MQTT, or LoRa gateway bridge with `rssi_dbm` / `signal_quality_pct`
app: MQTT Modular Input (Splunkbase #1890) or MQTT Topics Ingestor (Splunkbase #7575), HTTP Event Collector for Aranet Cloud REST, optional Splunk Edge Hub MQTT
spl:
index=environment sourcetype=aranet:sensor sensor_id=*
| stats latest(rssi_dbm) as rssi, latest(signal_quality_pct) as sigq by sensor_id, location
| where rssi < -115 OR sigq < 30
| table sensor_id, location, rssi, sigq
| sort rssi
description: Aranet LoRa sensors at the edge of RF coverage produce intermittent gaps before they go fully offline. Tracking RSSI or vendor signal quality percentage predicts dropped CO₂/temperature samples in cleanrooms, labs, and cold chains.
value: Stops blind spots in regulated environmental monitoring by moving or repeating gateways before sensors mute.
implementation: When ingesting Aranet JSON, map `rssi` from the gateway payload (dBm) or compute `signal_quality_pct` if the broker exposes a 0–100 score. Poll at the same cadence as telemetry (5–15 min). Alert when RSSI is weaker than −115 dBm (tune per antenna) or `signal_quality_pct` < 30 for two consecutive intervals. Correlate with new metal racking or relocated chillers.
visualization: Choropleth or floorplan heatmap (RSSI), Table (worst sensors), Line chart (RSSI trend).
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• Stable `sensor_id` key shared with CMMS.
• If only CSV export exists, use `inputcsv` batch jobs until streaming lands.

Step 1 — Normalize RSSI field name across Aranet4 vs PRO lines.

Step 2 — Baseline winter vs summer RF noise.

Step 3 — Validate by walking sensors away from gateway in lab.

Step 4 — Auto-task facilities when >5 sensors breach.
grandmaExplanation: We check how strong the wireless signal is for environmental sensors so they don’t go quiet in the corners of a building.
